Video.summary: Kelly's boyfriend says he has no idea how posts from him seeking sexual favors from other women got on various websites; Genesis thinks his wife cheats while he is at work.
Video.title: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Image.alt: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Video.summary: On April 27th, 2011 a tornado tore through Tuscaloosa Alabama causing massive damage and casualties. Toye’s daughter, Latoya, was reported missing, but then police investigated it as a homicide. Did Toye have something to do with her disappearance?
Video.title: Missing Person or Homicide?

Video.summary: Angelica says John "checks her" for signs of cheating every time she comes home. She wants a lie detector test to prove she's been faithful! Then, Ashley she found out that her boyfriend, TJ, had cheated on her when she was 8 months pregnant.
Video.title: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Video.summary: Christopher had to move away for a job and his wife, Ashley, says that she won't move until he proves that he's not a cheater. Then, Tim is worried that his wife Sasha is cheating because he found Facebook messages from her ex.
Video.title: Will These Results Destroy Us

Video.summary: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He’s accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?

Image.alt: Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?
Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?
Betrayed By My Life Long Friend?

Video.summary: Norma’s cousin Jessica says that her fiancé Brandon drunkenly tried to sleep with her. He denied the allegations, which has caused a rift in Norma’s family. Then, Steve catches up with past guest Ricky, but was any progress made?
Video.title: One Big Mistake?

Video.summary: Newlyweds Janiece and Shaquanna accuse each other of cheating with men; Robert says he recorded his girlfriend having sex with another man.
Video.title: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Image.alt: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Video.summary: Bobby and Amber are being accused of neglecting and abusing their three children. Then, Kyle believes that his mother-in-law Kristie may be coaching his kids to say that he molested them.
Video.title: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Image.alt: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Video.summary: Trina's fiance says he heard a voicemail that sounded like her having sex with another man; Amy has put up with her boyfriend's constant accusations of cheating for four years.
Video.title: Steve's Cheat Detector Kit?

Video.summary: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be a prostitute. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!
Video.title: A Shocking Betrayal

Video.summary: Secrets revealed ... Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. On their wedding day, she first learned that he had lied about his age and was only 18 years old, much younger than she. She also came to learn he was verbally and physically abusive. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth, and she's making a final decision on her misleading relationship.
Video.title: Not A Big Shocker

Video.summary: Released from jail, Chris doubts he is his girlfriend's baby's father; before marrying Tamaiya, Marquice wants to be sure her children are biologically his.
Video.title: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Image.alt: I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?
I Was In Jail, Am I The Father?

Video.summary: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.
Video.title: We Tested You Six Times

Video.summary: Ashley’s first love, Chris, betrayed her for her sister and now faces abuse allegations.
Video.title: He Left Me For My Sister

Image.alt: He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister

Video.summary: Sherry was raped at 15 and ran away from home. She’s asked for Steve’s help to reunite her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and abusive father Nick.
Video.title: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Image.alt: Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother
Steve Rescues a Runaway / Steve Helps a Teenage Mother

Video.summary: Teen Brittany's family is desperate to get her on the road to recovery from heroin addiction; Deyanna says her drug-addicted mother stole a large sum of money from her.
Video.title: Lives Destroyed By Heroin

Video.summary: A stay-at-home mom believes her boyfriend is going out and cheating on her; Melanie's old friends have been meddling in her marriage with James.
Video.title: She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating

Image.alt: She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating
She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating
She Checks Me But I'm Not Cheating

Video.summary: Jennifer claims she was sexually abused by her stepfather Allen and moved in with her best friend’s family to protect herself. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken relationship?
Video.title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Image.alt: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Video.summary: Very intimate photos of newlywed Chami with another man surface on a porn website; Keandra's boyfriend has accused her of cheating with co-workers, strangers and an elderly neighbor.
Video.title: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Image.alt: I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site
I Saw My Wife on a Porn Site

Video.summary: Jasmine’s 11 year old sister Lauren has had multiple sexual partners, stays out of the house for days on end and is headed on a downward spiral! Watch as Steve tries to help this troubled child and set her mother straight!
Video.title: Tragic Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Chris fears that his girlfriend is still sleeping with her abusive ex; Quay thinks constant arguments over cheating caused her to miscarry her twins; Raena says her man accuses her of cheating with every man she happens to be around.
Video.title: Blindsided by Results

Video.summary: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel’s cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!
Video.title: Did You Not Hear the Results?

Image.alt: Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?

Video.summary: Christina has custody of her nephew and suspects he’s the product of a sexual relationship between her sister Jennifer and brother Donald. They reunited at a party and she noticed they were very flirtatious. Then, did Patrick father Ebony’s child?
Video.title: Incest: DNA Shocker

Video.summary: Shamika says she had not spoken to her 8-year-old daughter in 18 days and had no idea the child was missing until she and her ex-boyfriend were questioned by the FBI.
Video.title: The Disappearance of Relisha Rudd

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: Lorri is here because she believes that her grandson is being abused by his mother Alyssa and her ex-boyfriend Josh. She's here to find out the truth about whether or not they are really guilty of this abuse.
Video.title: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Image.alt: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Video.summary: Tonya is here to stop her 14-year-old daughter Talia from ruining her life before she’s an adult. She doesn’t approve of her boyfriend Jerry who needs to get out of her daughter’s life because he’s responsible for everything that’s wrong with her.
Video.title: You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood

Video.summary: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Nick believes he's always been meant to be with Megan, even though he's only known her for 5 months. Megan however tells a very different tale, where Nick is imagining all the fate and passion between them. She claims they hardly know each other, and they've surely never slept together. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.
Video.title: Did We Have Sex?

Video.summary: Kelsey says her husband is abusing her. Malcolm believes that Kelsey has been cheating on him since the beginning and that their two kids may belong to another man. Plus, Carrie's boyfriend Chris thinks their child belongs to her ex.
Video.title: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Image.alt: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Video.summary: Alvin began to get very distant from his family, so Andrea began a relationship with Chris, a man she met on a chat line. Then, Brittany and Tony have an infant daughter together, but since getting Brittany pregnant he has abandoned his family.
Video.title: You Said I Wasn't The Father

Image.alt: You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father

Video.summary: Amber may not be the best mother, but her abusive boyfriend Alex is making their relationship and her son's upbringing, even worse. Then, David is desperate to get his kids back from ex-wife Fawn, who alleges David was an abusive father.
Video.title: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Image.alt: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Video.summary: A teenage boy abuses his mom, often getting his younger brother involved. He says that he got the idea when he'd witnessed one of his mother's boyfriends pull a knife on her.
Video.title: We Beat Up Our Mom
